title: Signal Processing Path
description: Build fluency in Signal Processing inside Data Processing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Analog-to-Digital Conversion
steps.summary: The process of converting analog signals or data into digital format. It sits inside Data Processing / Signal Processing. Compare it with Digital Therapeutics AI and Digital Immortality AI.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Fast Fourier Transform (FFT)
steps.summary: Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) belongs to the Data Processing area of AI/ML, within Signal Processing. It sits inside Data Processing / Signal Processing. Start after Fast Fourier Transform and Z-transform. It opens into Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) in Neural Networks.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Fast Fourier Transform
steps.summary: Fast Fourier Transform belongs to the Data Processing area of AI/ML, within Signal Processing. It sits inside Data Processing / Signal Processing. Start after Z-transform. It opens into Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) and Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) in Neural Networks.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: TreeSHAP
steps.summary: TreeSHAP belongs to the Data Processing area of AI/ML, within Signal Processing. It sits inside Data Processing / Signal Processing. Compare it with TREESHAP Fast Exact and Fast-SCNN. It opens into TREESHAP Fast Exact.
